title: Clinical and mutational spectrum of paediatric Charcot-Marie-Tooth disease in a large cohort of Chinese patients.

content: S-EPMC10381926 PMC10381926 Clinical and mutational spectrum of paediatric Charcot-Marie-Tooth disease in a large cohort of Chinese patients.
